violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Drain line from compressor in walk in cooler leaking onto loosely wrapped (aluminum foil) container of cooked chicken.--Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Store boxes of heavy cream off floor in walk in cooler.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. Raw chicken stored above raw beef and container of sauce in walk in cooler.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. No prepared food items have been date marked.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. Store rice cooker and meat grinder away from hand sink rto protect from potential splash contamination.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Store refuse cans away from food storage containers near cook line. Store boxes of single service items off floor in back storage area. Invert food storage containers to protect from potential contamination.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Drain line from compressor in walk in cooler leaking.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. East entry door not provided with self closing mechanism. Large gap at East entry door threshold.
Food service manager certification. — --Person in charge did not hold an approved food service manager certificate. Current staff in charge of running kitchen do not hold manager's certificate.
